'''changolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:featherweight|featherweight]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-ng-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:featherweight|featherweight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| changolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chængeleth|chængeleth]] || [[word:chængelej|chængelej]] || [[word:chængelesh|chængelesh]] || [[word:chængele|chængele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:changongoloth|changongoloth]] || [[word:changongoloj|changongoloj]] || [[word:changongolosh|changongolosh]] || [[word:changongolo|changongolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:changoloth|changoloth]] || [[word:changoloj|changoloj]] || [[word:changolosh|changolosh]] || [[word:changolo|changolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:changofloth|changofloth]] || [[word:changofloj|changofloj]] || [[word:changoflosh|changoflosh]] || [[word:changoflof|changoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:changolotho|changolotho]] || [[word:changolojo|changolojo]] || [[word:changolosho|changolosho]] || [[word:changoloko|changoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:changoloth|changoloth]] || [[word:changoloj|changoloj]] || [[word:changolosh|changolosh]] || [[word:changolo|changolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:changolothol|changolothol]] || [[word:changolojol|changolojol]] || [[word:changoloshol|changoloshol]] || [[word:changolokol|changolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:changolothotho|changolothotho]] || [[word:changolojojo|changolojojo]] || [[word:changoloshosho|changoloshosho]] || [[word:changoloko|changoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:changolothon|changolothon]] || [[word:changolojon|changolojon]] || [[word:changoloshon|changoloshon]] || [[word:changolokon|changolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:changolothoro|changolothoro]] || [[word:changolojoro|changolojoro]] || [[word:changoloshoro|changoloshoro]] || [[word:changolokoro|changolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
